title: Expand neighbourhood catalog with additional major Nairobi & metro areas

requirements.text: Expand the existing static neighbourhood catalog (frontend/src/data/neighbourhoodCatalog.ts) by adding additional major Nairobi and nearby metro neighbourhoods/areas, keeping the existing Neighbourhood shape (id, name, description, rentMin, rentMax, commuteNote, tags, imageFilename) and ensuring all entries have unique numeric IDs and no duplicate names.

quotes: Add other major neighbourhoods from the already existing ones .

acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/data/neighbourhoodCatalog.ts includes new Neighbourhood entries for the following user-requested areas (as individual entries or clearly named group entries where appropriate): Kitengela, Kiambu Region, Thika, Eastlands (e.g., Umoja/Donholm/Buruburu), Ruai, Utawala, Syokimau, Athi River, Rongai, Ngong, Ruiru, Kamulu, Joska, Kahawa West, Zimmerman, Embakasi South (e.g., Pipeline/Imara Daima), South C, Tatu City, Northlands.
All neighbourhood IDs in NAIROBI_NEIGHBOURHOODS are unique and continue consistently beyond the current highest ID (12).
The Discover swipe feed continues to render and allows swiping through the expanded list without runtime errors.
New entries use a valid imageFilename (may reuse the existing neighbourhood placeholder asset filename if no new images are provided).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any paths listed as immutable in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Keep the single-actor backend architecture unchanged; do not introduce additional backend services or databases.
nonGoals: Do not add third-party integrations (maps, geolocation, social, external databases, or non-Internet-Identity auth).
Do not implement AI-generated neighbourhood summaries or any new recommendation algorithm features beyond ensuring the expanded catalog works with the current feed.
